Comment: Daily trigger for the HitaVir Retail pipeline. Use this with EventBridge Scheduler (aws scheduler create-schedule --cli-input-json file://eventbridge_daily_schedule.json). Replace ACCOUNT_ID with your 12-digit AWS account id in every ARN and in the Input bucket name.
Name: hvt-retail-daily-pipeline
Description: Runs the hvt-retail-pipeline Step Functions state machine once a day at 02:00 UTC.
